savedquery.name: Program Manager Settings
savedquery.description: Shows active reminder and grace period settings, including vehicle age grace period.
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_reminderconfig"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_isActive" /> <attribute name="va_reminderDays1" /> <attribute name="va_reminderDays2" /> <attribute name="va_reminderDays3" /> <attribute name="va_gracePeriodDays" /> <attribute name="va_vehicleAgeGracePeriodDays" /> <attribute name="modifiedon" /> <order attribute="va_isActive" descending="true" /> <order attribute="modifiedon" descending="true" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_reminderconfigid"> <cell name="va_name" width="180" /> <cell name="va_isActive" width="80" /> <cell name="va_reminderDays1" width="90" /> <cell name="va_reminderDays2" width="90" /> <cell name="va_reminderDays3" width="90" /> <cell name="va_gracePeriodDays" width="110" /> <cell name="va_vehicleAgeGracePeriodDays" width="130" /> <cell name="modifiedon" width="130" /> </row> </grid>
